_comment: Manual corrections keyed by item.id. Fields here override scraped values after each run. Use --merge flag when running scrape.py.
_water_note: water_production_rate is sourced from the wiki 'Water Gather Rate' field. The wiki unit is unconfirmed — windtrap scrapes as 0.75 and large_windtrap as 1.75, giving hours_to_fill ≈ 667h and ≈ 286h respectively. Verify in-game before overriding.
